Dark Runed Breastplate  
 

No Trade
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 42
STR: +6 DEX: +6 STA: +6 INT: +14 AGI: +6 HP: +70 MANA: +30
SV MAGIC: +7 SV POISON: +3
Effect: Invigorate (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 14.5)
WT: 9.0 Size: LARGE
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 42

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 45
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Shadowknight Thurgadin Armor

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Thurgadin


Uploaded December 2nd, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
greenies
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2005 at 8:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592765044755
4 posts
Kael is a joke now, nothing except the level 70 raid mobs are much of a match for me now, been soloing laps around the arena and had a corroded breast plate drop last night. been trying too get torn silk robe for a quest so i can get a ft 4 robe 8) all of the other mage gear is crap these days.

66 mage erollis marr
▲ Page top
RE: greenies
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2005 at 4:45 PM Rating: Decent
Fanornador
Scholar
86 posts
Well - if you have the Corroded BP you've done it.

All you need to do is hit Thurg & do the quest for the Cleric BP (need 3 Black Marbles). Once you have it head to OOT - turn in the books in the right order then head to Aviak Isle and hand in your Token + the Cleric BP 7 VOILA ! a Grand Robe of the Oracle.

I did this last week on Tunare with my Mage & an Eroded Leather Tunic. All you have to turn-in to the NPC on Avaik isle is any of the 3 approved robes - Nec/Wiz/Mag/Enc/Clr/Dru/Shm - either will suffice - doesn't have to be your specific class.

Grats.
Fan


Edited, Mon Mar 28 16:47:00 2005
▲ Page top
got mine today
QuoteReply
# May 29 2003 at 6:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362259738
6 posts
Just got mine today,all and all its great.Nice stats good sv's and invigorate is just about the best way to regen your hitpoints w/o lifetaping a mob at my lvl.Lets face it you cant always find a mob to lifetap or risk engaging it if your low hp.I was holding out for a nocti BP but when they brought back the PoG's i pretty much lost all hopes of that.

i got this for my 33SK replaced his Blood Ember BP soon getin thrug Legs MQ'd to replace his Blood ember Legs

# Apr 04 2003 at 3:05 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759969079
51 posts
advice:

Keep the Blood ember pants!!!
You never know when that feign death proc helps...expecially fighting mobs that steal mana good for pulling even with the 3 sec cast time. (if you plan on getting your alt that high)
▲ Page top
RE: alt armor
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2003 at 9:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256413352
17 posts
Sweet Ikilum. You are proof that the mid-level game has become a runaway joke in EQ. Thank god that item prices have deflated so fast in the EQ economy...otherwise the casual EQ players would just get drowned out completely by AltQuest.

Nobody is at fault here, it's just that this game needs that EQ2 sequel soon. Thurg armor on an alt is bad, but it isnt Skyshrine or Kael quest stuff at least...not yet anyhow.

This Thurg armor would be so much cooler if the quest was more involved and the drops of eroded came faster. 2 or 3 gems is nothing compared to a 5 or 6 step quest. And for late 40s and early 50s characters, the droppable armor starts to be too weak just at this level...
▲ Page top
RE: alt armor
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2003 at 1:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759570704
10 posts

# May 14 2003 at 7:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591782600509
29 posts
I am 53 sk i justt got Bp i use it for a while it nice invig.. effect..but for the rest of thug armor 50ish it sucks for 50ish i got blood lord helm/boots/noc legs(pog no drop) and i stuck with thug arms still they not great but better then Teir'dal... but Bp is still good up till 58-60 until u can get SS..like vendo..or statue bp.

QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2003 at 4:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759294285
126 posts
Dark Runed should last you through your 50s at least. I have almost a full set of Dark Runed at 54, and recently got my first Skyshrine piece, the Blood Lord's Bracer.

I don't see me replacing my Dark Runed BP anytime soon, though. Not likely to see a Skyshrine plate BP drop anytime soon, and don't have the AP to win it if it did. C'est la vie.

# Aug 31 2002 at 2:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254202386
37 posts
Had the bp for this drop at arena (right) on Prexus tonight. Along with 2 plate legs, plate boots, plate gloves, and silk pants and chain pants. Needless to say lots of happy melee. These drops seem flukey, so I dont think its a reliable inticator of where bp drops, but you can get it here. Oh, and most gear came off veterans, who were dropping every time (or at least almost every time, might have lost track.)

# Jul 25 2002 at 10:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252988958
View User Forum
60 posts
IMHO, U want it, You earn it like the rest of us! Us Tanks are there for it and some fight to the death for it because we apreciate what it means to wear a new piece of armor that was fought for so strongly. I only wish that 1 day VI would figure out how to remove MQ abilities and make everything in game no drop, then I'd love to see how many camps are farmed. The EQ economy has been destroyed by te likes of MQers selling the stuff to lower people just cause they can well, it needs a change!
▲ Page top
RE: What would the PC be on the
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2002 at 1:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750465643
23 posts
actually it's debatable that without the MQ ability the market would not exsist. Lets not dwell on this topic however. Whether or not it's MQable, paying for gear is just as well as working for it IMO. Takes awhile to get the plat just like it takes awhile to camp the spawns that drop it.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 15 2004 at 12:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) just for the record u can go online and buy platinum pieces. So how do you figure that is working for it or earning it? I'd really like to know.
RE: What would the PC be on the
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2002 at 2:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757397175
217 posts
I support MQ not for selling but for helping guild mates. a lot of times, a guildmate isnt around that can use a dropped item, so instead of it rotting, sometimes we can MQ, like quest armor and epic items. which is handy because, lets face it, a lot of us just cant play as much as we want but our guild still wants to support us.

as for selling MQed items, i suppose thats ok, cept i dont know how much i trust the person on the other end. but then again, i play an skeptical Iksar SK, so i dont trust many people.

__DEL__1592251515951

the Kael armor is a nice tint of dark red, Skyshrine armor is a very deep purple, and i'm not sure about the dwarf armor...but the other 2 are those colors and on DE's its the same design as guardian armor
▲ Page top
Drop on quest item
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 3:49 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Went on my very first Kael raid today, and the quest item for this dropped, and we weren't even in the arena yet, we hadn't even made it to the bridge. A few ubers stopped by and didn't believe us when we said that the plate armor had dropped. Very nice, and a very lucky Troll ShadowKnight got this piece, becasue we looted 3 flawless diamonds to go with it. I came away from the raid with a nice neckpiece. You don't have to be totally uber to go into this place and do this, just be fairly organized. Someone in Gfay was shouting to start a group, we gathered a bunch of 45+'s and we went, we had 3 full groups. I was the highest as a 52 druid. Was quite fun, and these armor pieces don't just drop in the areana, but can drop outside of it also.

Taylon Moonshadow
52 Wanderer
Povar Server
Officer of Sunstorm Rising
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 25 2001 at 3:45 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hahah Noctivant is better , no nocti bp for me yet mabe ill get it tonight, everyone pray forme been waiting almost 3 mothes :P
#Anonymous, Posted: May 20 2001 at 2:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This would be perfect for monks.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 24 2001 at 2:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) NO MONK. Its a joke now people and some of you are getting so mad over it. Try reading the daily updates to equipment. The guy who said this NO-DROP SHD-ONLY chest would be perfect for monks is saying so because there seems to be an un-natural number of monk trolls proclaiming every item a monk item.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 04 2001 at 3:06 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I Agree, every damn post I see is a monk whining about how "perfect" this would be for them and crying that they can't use it! I AM SO GLAD THERE IS ARMOR COMMING OUT WITH LOW WEIGHT THAT *ISN'T* for MONKS!!! I am so tired of becoming over weight as a Cleric, and over weight with my Iksar SK :)

Geebus these stupid quest plate pieces get annoying as hell, the gems are easy to find and oyu can even buy em these days, but the armor component is a pain to get, rolling against every1 else in a 2-3 group raid in Kael =P
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 24 2001 at 8:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Who says a level 16 can't get a SoulFire? I say a level 16 can't get a SoulFire, I say your guild can, or possibly some really gullible friends.
Can people not read
QuoteReply
# May 16 2001 at 8:01 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Ok for the love of god...........INVIGOR=Stamina regen spell.......INVIGORATE=100 or so HP Self Heal clickable 16 second cast time.........Try reading other classes message boards there is alot of helpful info posted......and for the guy that wrote WTF Does this drop......ok obviously you dont take time to pay attention to details so do us all a favor and quit EQ and go live in the mountains with a donkey and grow coffee.......no way do I like grouping with people that dont pay attention.......a potential 6 hour raid turns into a 2 hour CR cause you didnt read Do Not Wander.........so now that I have cleared a few things up with my snide remarks and ignorant manner hopefully we can all go on with our lives

The spell has NOTHING to do with stamina. For god sakes people listen! Its a 90hp heal spell!

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 16 2001 at 7:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Invigorate really does not matter too much after your sta goes to 100, at least that is what I noticed after I get my shammy buffs, and I use a wurm, and I promise you it is max damage for a ranger for awhile...in fact, as long as your 1hs skill is ANY good, you will deal tons of melee, no matter what class. Anyway, invigorate is not a bad effect, esp because no casters will waste a slot on the spell.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 15 2001 at 3:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) if you played a melee to a higher lvl then you wuld know invigor would be a great spell to have on a piece of equipment especially after nonstop fightin and your tired (or hal through a fight with a wurmslayer like all them n00bs use)
#Anonymous, Posted: May 15 2001 at 12:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) where does this damned thing drop

Anonymous
the Invigorate on this bp isn't the lv druid sta restoring spell, it's a 100 point heal spell.
